app.name: Crossy Road
app.description:
Join over 100 MILLION players worldwide and experience Hipster Whale's massive viral #1 hit!
“A smorgasbord of vibrant, rewarding moments” - Gamezebo “You can play it for two minutes or two hours and love every second of it” - Time "Just pure love and frustration, in equal doses" - Polygon
Why did the Chicken cross the road? Why did the Pigeon leave THAT there? Why did Specimen 115 abduct that cow? Why did Unihorse eat all that candy?
FEATURES: - Collect retro-styled, pop art inspired characters - Cross roads, train tracks, and rivers – endlessly hop forever - Simple, pure, innovative gameplay - Free to play
Crossy Road is completely free to play but some in-game items such as characters, can be purchased with hard currency. Characters are priced between $0.99 and $3.99.
Have any problems or suggestions? You can reach us at gpsupport@yodo1.com.
